mapper.sql: id, threads, sourcefile, starttime, endtime, filterdisplay
mapper.insert:
insert into report_infor
id,
threads,
sourcefile,
starttime,
endtime,
filterdisplay,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sourcefile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{starttime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{endtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{filterdisplay,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update report_infor
threads = #{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sourcefile = #{sourcefile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
starttime = #{starttime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
endtime = #{endtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
filterdisplay = #{filterdisplay,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update report_infor set threads = #{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sourcefile = #{sourcefile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, starttime = #{starttime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, endtime = #{endtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, filterdisplay = #{filterdisplay,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
